php-native-error.regexp: ##teamcity\[testFailed.+message='Test code or tested code printed unexpected output:(?:\s|\|n\s)*(.*error):\s+(.+) in /app/(.+) on line (\d+)

php-native-warning.regexp: ##teamcity\[testFailed.+message='Test code or tested code printed unexpected output:(?:\s|\|n\s)*(.*Warning|.*Deprecated|.*Notice):\s+(.+) in /app/(.+) on line (\d+)
